_comment_top: Shape inferred from Repomix README + gitingest output examples (Repomix v0.2.x emits an XML body and a JSON manifest; gitingest emits a markdown body with a tree + content; codebase-digest emits a plaintext concatenation). The bundle@1 schema normalizes all three into a small JSON pointer that consumers can resolve to the raw packed body via content_url. _comment_* keys are not part of the upstream shape — they document inference. Real-world bundles in the wild typically embed the file list inline (Repomixs file_summary block, gitingests tree section); we mirror that here with a representative ~10-file slice.
summary: Sample TypeScript service: HTTP server, two route handlers, an in-memory store, a small CLI shim, plus unit and integration tests. Bundled at HEAD of main. Suitable as a one-shot context drop for an LLM doing a code-review or architecture-overview pass.
